0.title: Total balance
0.body: The sum of every account's balance, locked funds included.

1.title: Insights
1.body: Automatic alerts: over-budget categories, unusual spending, budgets that could use a tweak.

2.title: Balance curve
2.body: Day-by-day evolution. The diamonds are your reconciliation checkpoints.

3.title: Spending by category
3.body: Click a donut slice to filter transactions by that category.

4.title: Cash flow
4.body: The Sankey traces where money came from and where it went over the visible period.

0.title: Add an account
0.body: Checking, savings, brokerage… The starting balance is required — every calculation starts from there.

1.title: Locked funds
1.body: For accounts like brokerage or term deposits, tick 'locked' to isolate them from your available balance.

0.title: Drop a file
0.body: OFX, CSV, or PDF. The first time a bank's PDF is imported, an assistant asks you to point at the amount, date, and label zones.

1.title: Multi-select
1.body: Tick several rows to change their category or delete them at once.

2.title: Split a transaction
2.body: Open a transaction to break it into several sub-lines, or edit a category inline.

0.title: Sorting rules
0.body: Rules apply to new imports and can be re-applied retroactively without overwriting your manual categories.

1.title: Sort tab
1.body: Create a rule from a keyword in one click.

0.title: Monthly budget
0.body: Set a target amount per category. Over-budget categories turn red.

0.title: Full backup
0.body: Export accounts, transactions, checkpoints, and splits to one file. Re-import on another install to restore.
